topIngredients.name: Sweet Almond Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Rich emollient oil that nourishes dry and rough skin

topIngredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Retains moisture in body skin for up to 72 hours

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Draws environmental moisture into the skin continuously

verdict: NIVEA Essentially Enriched is an exceptional value body lotion. The almond oil and hyaluronic acid combination delivers 72-hour moisture that outperforms products at three times the price. Best for dry to very dry skin.
